tasks.spec:
You are a zero-cost mock worker proving the Ringside v2 conversation pane renders real turns without needing feeder. Produce alpha.txt.

tasks.check: test -f /tmp/ringer-mock-convo/alpha/alpha.txt && grep -q 'mock worker' /tmp/ringer-mock-convo/alpha/alpha.txt && echo 'mock ok' || { echo 'FAIL: alpha.txt missing/wrong'; exit 1; }
tasks.verified: alpha.txt exists and contains the mock worker's line (executed)
